# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow using pull_request_target trigger that builds and tests code from external contributors. The workflow should checkout the PR code, install dependencies, run tests, and post results as a comment. This enables automated testing of community contributions.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cicd security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Community PR Testing

on:
  pull_request_target:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened]

permissions:
  pull-requests: write
  contents: read

jobs:
  authorize:
    name: Authorize External Contributor
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: external-pr-approval
    steps:
      - name: Require manual approval for external PRs
        run: echo "PR has been approved for testing by a maintainer via the 'external-pr-approval' environment protection rule."

  build-and-test:
    name: Build and Test PR
    needs: authorize
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
      PR_SHA: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout base repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.base.ref }}
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Fetch PR code via merge ref
        run: |
          git fetch origin "refs/pull/${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}/merge:pr-merge" --no-tags
          git checkout pr-merge

      - name: Validate no workflow modifications
        run: |
          CHANGED_FILES=$(git diff --name-only HEAD~1 HEAD)
          if echo "$CHANGED_FILES" | grep -qE '^\.(github)/'; then
            echo "::error::PR modifies .github/ directory files. This is not allowed for external contributions."
            exit 1
          fi
          if echo "$CHANGED_FILES" | grep -qiE '(Makefile|Dockerfile|docker-compose|\.sh$)'; then
            echo "::warning::PR modifies build/infrastructure files. Please review carefully."
          fi

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'

      - name: Install dependencies (locked)
        run: |
          if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then
            npm ci
          elif [ -f yarn.lock ]; then
            yarn install --frozen-lockfile
          else
            echo "::error::No lockfile found. Cannot install dependencies securely."
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Run linter
        id: lint
        continue-on-error: true
        run: |
          npm run lint 2>&1 | head -500 | tee lint-output.txt
          echo "exit_code=${PIPESTATUS[0]}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Run tests
        id: test
        continue-on-error: true
        timeout-minutes: 15
        run: |
          npm test 2>&1 | head -1000 | tee test-output.txt
          echo "exit_code=${PIPESTATUS[0]}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Run build
        id: build
        continue-on-error: true
        timeout-minutes: 10
        run: |
          npm run build 2>&1 | head -500 | tee build-output.txt
          echo "exit_code=${PIPESTATUS[0]}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Prepare results comment
        id: prepare-comment
        run: |
          LINT_STATUS="${{ steps.lint.outputs.exit_code }}"
          TEST_STATUS="${{ steps.test.outputs.exit_code }}"
          BUILD_STATUS="${{ steps.build.outputs.exit_code }}"

          LINT_EMOJI=$( [ "$LINT_STATUS" = "0" ] && echo "✅" || echo "❌" )
          TEST_EMOJI=$( [ "$TEST_STATUS" = "0" ] && echo "✅" || echo "❌" )
          BUILD_EMOJI=$( [ "$BUILD_STATUS" = "0" ] && echo "✅" || echo "❌" )

          # Sanitize outputs to prevent injection - strip backticks and HTML
          sanitize() {
            head -100 "$1" 2>/dev/null | sed 's/`//g; s/<//g; s/>//g; s/&/\&amp;/g' || echo "No output captured"
          }

          LINT_OUTPUT=$(sanitize lint-output.txt)
          TEST_OUTPUT=$(sanitize test-output.txt)
          BUILD_OUTPUT=$(sanitize build-output.txt)

          # Use a delimiter approach for multiline output
          EOF_MARKER=$(dd if=/dev/urandom bs=15 count=1 2>/dev/null | base64)
          {
            echo "comment_body<<${EOF_MARKER}"
            echo "## 🤖 Automated PR Test Results"
            echo ""
            echo "**Commit:** \`${PR_SHA}\`"
            echo ""
            echo "| Check | Status |"
            echo "|-------|--------|"
            echo "| Lint | ${LINT_EMOJI} $([ "$LINT_STATUS" = "0" ] && echo 'Passed' || echo 'Failed') |"
            echo "| Tests | ${TEST_EMOJI} $([ "$TEST_STATUS" = "0" ] && echo 'Passed' || echo 'Failed') |"
            echo "| Build | ${BUILD_EMOJI} $([ "$BUILD_STATUS" = "0" ] && echo 'Passed' || echo 'Failed') |"
            echo ""
            if [ "$LINT_STATUS" != "0" ]; then
              echo "<details><summary>Lint Output (truncated)</summary>"
              echo ""
              echo "${LINT_OUTPUT}"
              echo ""
              echo "</details>"
              echo ""
            fi
            if [ "$TEST_STATUS" != "0" ]; then
              echo "<details><summary>Test Output (truncated)</summary>"
              echo ""
              echo "${TEST_OUTPUT}"
              echo ""
              echo "</details>"
              echo ""
            fi
            if [ "$BUILD_STATUS" != "0" ]; then
              echo "<details><summary>Build Output (truncated)</summary>"
              echo ""
              echo "${BUILD_OUTPUT}"
              echo ""
              echo "</details>"
              echo ""
            fi
            echo "---"
            echo "*This test was run after maintainer approval via environment protection rules.*"
            echo "${EOF_MARKER}"
          } >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

          # Set overall status
          if [ "$LINT_STATUS" = "0" ] && [ "$TEST_STATUS" = "0" ] && [ "$BUILD_STATUS" = "0" ]; then
            echo "overall=success" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo "overall=failure" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

      - name: Post results comment
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const body = process.env.COMMENT_BODY;
            const prNumber = parseInt(process.env.PR_NUMBER, 10);

            // Find and update existing bot comment if present
            const comments = await github.rest.issues.listComments({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              issue_number: prNumber,
              per_page: 100
            });

            const botComment = comments.data.find(c =>
              c.user.type === 'Bot' && c.body.includes('🤖 Automated PR Test Results')
            );

            if (botComment) {
              await github.rest.issues.updateComment({
                owner: context.repo.owner,
                repo: context.repo.repo,
                comment_id: botComment.id,
                body: body
              });
            } else {
              await github.rest.issues.createComment({
                owner: context.repo.owner,
                repo: context.repo.repo,
                issue_number: prNumber,
                body: body
              });
            }
        env:
          COMMENT_BODY: ${{ steps.prepare-comment.outputs.comment_body }}
          PR_NUMBER: ${{ env.PR_NUMBER }}

      - name: Set commit status
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const state = process.env.OVERALL_STATUS === 'success' ? 'success' : 'failure';
            await github.rest.repos.createCommitStatus({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              sha: process.env.PR_SHA,
              state: state,
              target_url: `https://github.com/${context.repo.owner}/${context.repo.repo}/actions/runs/${context.runId}`,
              description: state === 'success' ? 'All checks passed' : 'Some checks failed',
              context: 'Community PR Tests'
            });
        env:
          OVERALL_STATUS: ${{ steps.prepare-comment.outputs.overall }}
          PR_SHA: ${{ env.PR_SHA }}

      - name: Fail if checks did not pass
        if: steps.prepare-comment.outputs.overall != 'success'
        run: |
          echo "::error::One or more checks failed. See the PR comment for details."
          exit 1
